ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "verb" TEXT /* The type of interaction (e.g., 'is following', 'likes') */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user or content being targeted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the interaction was created */,
  "target_content_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the content, if applicable */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user performing the interaction */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the interaction type */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the interaction */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility settings for the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_target_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The user's chosen username */,
  "email" TEXT /* The user's email address */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief description about the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* The user's location */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The last date the user logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* The status of the user's account */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* User preferences for privacy settings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who posted the content */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* The date the content was posted */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* The type of content (e.g., 'image', 'video', 'text') */,
  "title" TEXT /* The title of the content */,
  "description" TEXT /* A description of the content */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the content */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location where the content was posted */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* Privacy settings for the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "verb" TEXT /* The verb describing the interaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* A description of the interaction */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the interaction type */,
  "notification_settings" TEXT /* Settings for notifications related to this interaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the interaction */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the content */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the interaction type */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id", "content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_follows" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who is following */,
  "followed_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user being followed */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* The date the follow was created */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility settings for the follow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id", "followed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_likes" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who liked the content */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the content */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* The date the like was created */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility settings for the like */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "content_id")
)
